<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sĭng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:Piáng-sṳ̂n]][[ja:丙申]][[ko:병신]][[nds:Füür-Aap]][[vi:Bính Thân]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sin]][[zh-yue:丙申]][[zh:丙申]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sĭng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:Piáng-sṳ̂n]][[ja:丙申]][[ko:병신]][[nds:Füür-Aap]][[vi:Bính Thân]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sin]][[zh-yue:丙申]][[zh:丙申]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sĭng]][[de:Feuer-Affe]][[fr:Singe de feu]][[hak:Piáng-sṳ̂n]][[ja:丙申]][[ko:병신]][[nds:Füür-Aap]][[vi:Bính Thân]][[za:Bingjsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sin]][[zh-yue:丙申]][[zh:丙申]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Monkey|kanji=丙申|romaji=hinoe saru|onyomi=heishin|p=bǐngshēn|w=ping-shen|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ʂən|y=bing2 san1|j=bing2 san1|ci=pɪŋ ʂɐn|mc=pæŋ ʂin|oc-bs=praŋ ʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Monkey also known as 丙申''' (hinoesaru (丙申), heikanosaru (丙申), heishin (丙申)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 33rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Monkey (丙申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: heishin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsin (병신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Thân

<!--
==
* Yang Fire Monkey (丙申) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのえさる (hinoe-saru)
***Onyomi: へいかのさる (heika-no-saru)
***Onyomi: へいしん (heishin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongsin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Thân

-->
==Years of Yang Fire Monkey==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 36 when divided by 60 is a year of Heishin ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Heishin (丙申の年)'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 36|en|AD 36|WD=Q28469|lt=36 AD|1=AD 36}}
* {{ill|AD 96|en|AD 96|WD=Q31365|lt=96 AD|1=AD 96}}
* {{ill|156|en|156|WD=Q24594|lt=156 AD|1=156}}
* {{ill|216|en|216|WD=Q31250|lt=216 AD|1=216}} * {{ill|276|en|276|WD=Q32797|lt=276 AD|1=276}}
* {{ill|336|en|336|WD=Q32101|lt=336 AD|1=336}}
* {{ill|396|en|396|WD=Q48139|lt=396 AD|1=396}}
* {{ill|456|en|456|WD=Q30432|lt=456 AD|1=456}}
* {{ill|516|en|516|WD=Q32901|lt=516 AD|1=516}}
* {{ill|576|en|576|WD=Q30984|lt=576 AD|1=576}}
* {{ill|636|en|636|WD=Q30126|lt=636 AD|1=636}}
* {{ill|696|en|696|WD=Q23486|lt=696 AD|1=696}}
* {{ill|756|en|756|WD=Q31121|lt=756 AD|1=756}}
* {{ill|816|en|816|WD=Q29920|lt=816 AD|1=816}}
* {{ill|876|en|876|WD=Q23815|lt=876 AD|1=876}}
* {{ill|936|en|936|WD=Q23584|lt=936 AD|1=936}}
* {{ill|996|en|996|WD=Q23452|lt=996 AD|1=996}}
|
* {{ill|1056|en|1056|WD=Q19375|lt=1056 AD|1=1056}}
* {{ill|1116|en|1116|WD=Q19536|lt=1116 AD|1=1116}}
* {{ill|1176|en|1176|WD=Q19693|lt=1176 AD|1=1176}}
* {{ill|1236|en|1236|WD=Q5427|lt=1236 AD|1=1236}}
* {{ill|1296|en|1296|WD=Q5561|lt=1296 AD|1=1296}}
* {{ill|1356|en|1356|WD=Q6130|lt=1356 AD|1=1356}}
* {{ill|1416|en|1416|WD=Q6189|lt=1416 AD|1=1416}}
* {{ill|1476|en|1476|WD=Q6611|lt=1476 AD|1=1476}}
* {{ill|1536|en|1536|WD=Q6457|lt=1536 AD|1=1536}}
* {{ill|1596|en|1596|WD=Q6785|lt=1596 AD|1=1596}}
* {{ill|1656|en|1656|WD=Q6982|lt=1656 AD|1=1656}}
* {{ill|1716|en|1716|WD=Q6892|lt=1716 AD|1=1716}}
* {{ill|1776|en|1776|WD=Q7703|lt=1776 AD|1=1776}}
* {{ill|1836|en|1836|WD=Q7601|lt=1836 AD|1=1836}}
* {{ill|1896|en|1896|WD=Q7846|lt=1896 AD|1=1896}}
* {{ill|1956|en|1956|WD=Q5221|lt=1956 AD|1=1956}}
|
* {{ill|2016|en|2016|WD=Q25245|lt=2016 AD|1=2016}}
* {{ill|2076 AD|ja|2076年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2076|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2076 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2136 AD|ja|2136年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2136|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2136 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2196 AD|ja|2196年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2196|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2196 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2256 AD|ja|2256年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2256|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2256 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2316 AD|ja|2316年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2316|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2316 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2376 AD|ja|2376年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2376|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2376 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2436 AD|ja|2436年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2436|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2436 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2496 AD|ja|2496年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2496|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2496 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2556 AD|ja|2556年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2556|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2556 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2616 AD|ja|2616年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2616|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2616 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2676 AD|ja|2676年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2676|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2676 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2736 AD|ja|2736年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2736|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2736 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2796 AD|ja|2796年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2796|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2796 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2856 AD|ja|2856年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2856|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2856 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2916 AD|ja|2916年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2916|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2916 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2976 AD|ja|2976年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2976|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2976 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July|1=July}} is designated as the Heishin month ({{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}). However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Heishin is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Heishin day is the 4th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kap-chú]]
[[zh-yue:甲子]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Fire Monkey|qq=ja|丙申|version=84123806|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Gák-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Röttvi]]
[[de:Yang Fire Monkey]]

[[ja:丙申]]
[[zh:丙申]]
[[ko:병신]]
[[fr:Singe de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Affe]]

[[af:Metaalrot (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Ratteen]]
[[en:Metal Rat]]
[[fr:Rat de métalboishak]]
[[it:Kap-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:갑자]]
[[vi:Giáp Tý]]
[[za:Gyapceij]]
[[zh:甲子]]
[[ar:Yang Fire Monkey]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Bīng-sĭng]]
[[hak:Piáng-sṳ̂n]]
[[nds:Füür-Aap]]
[[vi:Bính Thân]]
[[za:Bingjsaen]]
[[zh-min-nan:Péng-sin]]
[[zh-yue:丙申]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuuraap (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Bīng-sĭng]]
[[hak:Piáng-sṳ̂n]]
[[nds:Füür-Aap]]
[[vi:Bính Thân]]
[[za:Bingjsaen]]
[[zh-min-nan:Péng-sin]]
[[zh-yue:丙申]]
{{wikidata link|Q1061831}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
